page_title: MENS CLASSIC PANJABI | One Ummah BD
page_description:
Product Highlights


	
	Superior Fabric: Made from premium blended materials that are wrinkle-resistant and soft against the skin.
	
	
	Precision Craftsmanship: Features high-density embroidery and reinforced stitching for longevity.
	
	
	Tailored Fit: A refined silhouette that provides a structured look without compromising on movement.
	


Specifications & Care


	
	Fit: Regular Fit  available.
	
	
	Collar: Band collar with intricate detailing.
	
	
	Cuffs: Matching embroidered cuffs (select models).
	
	
	Care Instructions: Hand wash recommended or gentle machine wash in cold water. Iron on low heat (inside out) to protect embroidery.
	


Why choose ONE UMMAH BD? > We believe in "Excellence in Every Stitch." Our designs are more than just clothing; they are a statement of faith, identity, and premium quality.
